name: ChatGPT
description: 通用 AI 助手，适合写作、问答、学习与头脑风暴。
descriptionEn: General AI assistant for writing, Q&A, learning, and brainstorming.
bestFor: 通用问答、写作草稿、学习辅导
bestForEn: General Q&A, drafting, and learning support
pricingNote: 免费版可用，进阶模型与更高额度需订阅
pricingNoteEn: Free tier available; advanced models and higher limits require subscription
features: 多轮对话与上下文理解

name: Claude
description: 长文本与总结表现优秀，适合文档处理。
descriptionEn: Excellent at long-context reading and summarization for document work.
bestFor: 论文/合同/长文档阅读与总结
bestForEn: Reading and summarizing papers, contracts, and long documents
pricingNote: 提供免费体验，高额度与团队功能需付费
pricingNoteEn: Free access available; higher usage and team features are paid
consEn: Response speed can vary at peak times

name: Gemini
description: Google 的 AI 助手，支持多模态能力。
descriptionEn: Google AI assistant with multimodal capabilities.
bestFor: Google 生态协同、图文混合理解
bestForEn: Google ecosystem workflows and multimodal understanding
pricingNote: 基础功能可免费使用，进阶模型和企业能力需订阅
pricingNoteEn: Core features are free; advanced models and enterprise capabilities require subscription

name: Midjourney
description: 高质量 AI 绘图工具，风格化能力强。
descriptionEn: High-quality AI image generation with strong stylization.

name: Leonardo AI
description: 适合快速出图与风格尝试的绘图平台。
descriptionEn: Image platform for fast generation and style exploration.

name: Canva AI
description: 设计工具内置 AI 功能，适合海报与社媒图。
descriptionEn: Design platform with built-in AI, great for posters and social media graphics.

name: Runway
description: AI 视频生成与编辑，适合短视频创作。
descriptionEn: AI video generation and editing for short-form content.

name: Pika
description: 文本转视频工具，上手快、适合创意内容。
descriptionEn: Text-to-video tool that is easy to use for creative content.

name: CapCut
description: 剪映国际版，含多种 AI 视频功能。
descriptionEn: CapCut global edition with multiple AI video features.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: 代码补全与编程辅助，支持主流 IDE。
descriptionEn: Code completion and programming assistance for major IDEs.

name: Codeium
description: 免费的 AI 编程助手，支持多语言。
descriptionEn: Free AI coding assistant with multi-language support.

name: Replit AI
description: 在线开发平台 + AI 编程能力。
descriptionEn: Online development platform with AI coding capabilities.

name: Notion AI
description: 文档写作、总结与知识管理场景常用。
descriptionEn: Commonly used for writing, summarization, and knowledge management.

name: Grammarly
description: 英文写作润色与语法检查工具。
descriptionEn: English writing enhancement and grammar checking tool.

name: Tome
description: AI 生成演示文稿与提案内容。
descriptionEn: AI-generated presentations and proposal content.

name: Khanmigo
description: 学习辅导型 AI，适合学生与自学。
descriptionEn: Learning-focused AI tutor for students and self-learners.

name: Perplexity
description: AI 搜索与答案整合，适合快速查资料。
descriptionEn: AI search and answer synthesis for fast research.

name: Elicit
description: 面向研究与论文检索的 AI 工具。
descriptionEn: AI tool for research and academic paper discovery.

name: DeepSeek
description: 国产大语言模型与对话助手，支持多轮对话与代码能力。
descriptionEn: Chinese large language model and chat assistant with strong reasoning and coding capabilities.

name: Cursor
description: 面向开发者的 AI 编程编辑器，支持智能补全、重构与对话协作。
descriptionEn: AI-powered code editor for developers with intelligent completion, refactoring, and chat assistance.

name: Suno
description: AI 音乐生成平台，一键生成完整歌曲与伴奏。
descriptionEn: AI music generation platform for creating full songs and instrumentals from text.

name: Sora
description: OpenAI 推出的文本转视频模型，可根据描述生成高质量视频。
descriptionEn: Text-to-video model from OpenAI that generates high-quality videos from descriptions.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: 开源文生图模型，广泛用于 AI 绘画与自建出图服务。
descriptionEn: Open-source text-to-image model widely used for AI art and self-hosted image generation.

name: ElevenLabs
description: 高质量 AI 语音合成与配音平台，支持多语言与情感控制。
descriptionEn: High-quality AI voice synthesis and dubbing platform with multilingual and emotional control.

name: Gamma
description: AI 演示文稿与网页生成工具，可一键生成 PPT 风格页面。
descriptionEn: AI tool for generating slide-style presentations and web pages from prompts.

name: Copy.ai
description: 营销与文案写作向的 AI 工具，支持广告、邮件、社交媒体内容生成。
descriptionEn: AI copywriting tool for marketing content such as ads, emails, and social posts.

name: Jasper
description: 面向品牌与团队的 AI 写作助手，支持多渠道内容创作与协作。
descriptionEn: AI writing assistant for brands and teams, supporting multi-channel content creation and collaboration.

name: Descript
description: 集文字编辑、音频剪辑和视频剪辑于一体的多媒体编辑工具。
descriptionEn: Multimedia editing tool combining text-based editing, audio editing, and video editing.

name: Synthesia
description: AI 虚拟人视频生成平台，可快速生成配音与口播视频。
descriptionEn: AI avatar video platform for quickly generating talking-head and narrated videos.

name: HeyGen
description: 支持多语言虚拟人和口型同步的 AI 视频生成工具。
descriptionEn: AI video generation tool with multilingual avatars and lip-sync capabilities.

name: Kling AI
description: 面向创作者的文本转视频平台，支持多风格短视频生成。
descriptionEn: Text-to-video platform for creators, supporting multi-style short video generation.

name: Luma AI
description: 支持 3D 场景与视频生成的多模态创作平台。
descriptionEn: Multimodal creation platform for generating 3D scenes and videos.

name: Ideogram
description: 擅长文字排版与海报风格的 AI 文生图工具。
descriptionEn: Text-to-image tool specialized in typography and poster-style designs.

name: Flux AI
description: 面向高质量创意出图的文生图模型与平台。
descriptionEn: Text-to-image model and platform focused on high-quality creative image generation.

name: Recraft
description: 适合品牌设计与矢量插画的 AI 绘图平台。
descriptionEn: AI image platform for brand design, vector illustrations, and icons.

name: Google AI Studio
description: 面向开发者的 Gemini 调试与 API 原型平台。
descriptionEn: Gemini playground and API prototyping platform for developers.

name: OpenRouter
description: 聚合多家大模型 API 的统一调用平台。
descriptionEn: Unified API gateway for multiple LLM providers.

name: Hugging Face
description: 开源模型与数据集社区，支持在线推理与部署。
descriptionEn: Open-source model and dataset hub with inference and deployment tools.

name: Mistral Le Chat
description: Mistral 官方对话助手，响应快，适合日常问答。
descriptionEn: Official Mistral chat assistant for fast everyday Q&A.

name: Grok
description: xAI 对话助手，擅长实时热点与网页信息问答。
descriptionEn: xAI assistant focused on real-time topics and web-grounded Q&A.

name: Character.AI
description: 角色扮演与陪伴对话平台，适合娱乐和创意写作。
descriptionEn: Roleplay and companion chat platform for entertainment and creative writing.

name: Poe
description: 聚合多模型的聊天平台，可快速切换不同助手。
descriptionEn: Multi-model chat platform with quick assistant switching.

name: Phind
description: 面向开发者的问题解答与代码搜索助手。
descriptionEn: Developer-focused Q&A and code search assistant.

name: Tabnine
description: 企业级 AI 代码补全工具，注重安全与私有化。
descriptionEn: Enterprise AI code completion focused on security and private deployment.

name: Amazon CodeWhisperer
description: AWS 推出的编程助手，适合云开发场景。
descriptionEn: AWS coding assistant for cloud development workflows.

name: Dify
description: 开源 LLM 应用开发平台，支持工作流与知识库。
descriptionEn: Open-source LLM app platform with workflows and knowledge bases.

name: n8n
description: 自动化工作流平台，可结合 AI 节点搭建智能流程。
descriptionEn: Workflow automation platform with AI nodes for intelligent pipelines.

name: Zapier AI
description: 通过自然语言配置自动化，连接常见办公应用。
descriptionEn: Natural-language automation setup connecting common productivity apps.

name: Figma AI
description: Figma 内置 AI 设计能力，支持原型与文案生成。
descriptionEn: Built-in Figma AI for design, prototyping, and content generation.

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Adobe 官方生成式 AI，适合图像与设计素材生成。
descriptionEn: Adobe's generative AI for image and design asset creation.

name: remove.bg
description: AI 一键抠图工具，适合电商与设计快速处理。
descriptionEn: One-click AI background removal for e-commerce and design workflows.

name: VEED
description: 在线视频编辑平台，集成字幕、配音与 AI 剪辑。
descriptionEn: Online video editor with subtitles, voiceover, and AI editing tools.

name: Otter.ai
description: 会议实时转录与总结工具，适合团队协作记录。
descriptionEn: Meeting transcription and summarization tool for team collaboration.

name: NotebookLM
description: Google 知识笔记助手，可基于资料生成总结与问答。
descriptionEn: Google knowledge notebook assistant for source-based summaries and Q&A.

name: Wolfram|Alpha
description: 计算与知识引擎，擅长数学、科学和数据推理。
descriptionEn: Computational knowledge engine strong in math, science, and data reasoning.
